intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/20. 10s at 200%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/20. 170-200% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Standing. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/20. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/20. 0:10 at 200%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/20. Power: 170-200%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 10 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/2. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/2. 18% complete. Hold 95% steady. 41 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 18% complete. Block 1/2. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/2. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 3:00 at 95%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 18 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/20. 0:20 at 150%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 150% FTP, Standing. 20s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 150% for 20s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/20. 150% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/20. 150% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 2:00 at 90%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 3min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 88-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/2.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 13 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/2.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/20. 0:30 at 140%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 28% complete. Rep 5/20. 140% at 88-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 30s at 140%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/20. 140% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 28% complete. Rep 5/20. 140% for 30s. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 29% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 29% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 70%, 88-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 29% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 7/20. 0:10 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 200% FTP, Standing. 10s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 200%, 88-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 7/20. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 7/20. 200% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/2. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 12 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 31% through session. Block 1/2. You've done 7min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 3:00 at 95%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/2.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/2. 34 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 9/20. 0:20 at 150%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 150% FTP, Standing. 20s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/20. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 9/20. 150% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 9/20. 150% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 37% complete. Block 1/2. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 85% at 88-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/2. 2:00 at 85%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 85% for 2:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% into session. Seated at 88-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 27min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 5:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 200% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 75-85 rpm, 170-200% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 200% for 10s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 11/20. 27 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 9 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 0:10 at 200%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 24 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 95% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 8 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 150% for 20s. Then 24min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 75-85 rpm, 150-150% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 150%, 75-85 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 13/20. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 0:20 at 150%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 56% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 22 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 31 minutes in. 90% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 56% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 56% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 15/20. 60% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 15 of 20. Target: 140% FTP, 75-85 rpm. 5 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% done. 5 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% complete. Rep 15/20. 140% for 30s. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 33 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 20 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 33 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% complete. 20 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 17/20. 34 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 17 of 20. Target: 200% FTP, 75-85 rpm. 3 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34 minutes of work done. 20 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. 3 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 17/20. 200% FTP × 10s. Standing. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 63% through. 95% at 75-85 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 19min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 75-85 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. 2 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 34 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 2/2.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 19/20. 37 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 19. 22min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 37 minutes of work done. 17 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 19/20. 37 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 68% into session. 150%, 75-85 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 2:00 at 85%. Then 15min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 2:00 at 85%. Then 15min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 2:00 at 85%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 85% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 72% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 72% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 72% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 72% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 81% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 81% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% for 10:00. Finish strong.
